Interface PinnableCursorClip

All Superinterfaces:
Clip, Cursor, CursorClip, HardwareBindable, ObjectProxy, PinnableCursor, RelativeHardwarControlBindable, Subscribable
public interface PinnableCursorClip extends CursorClip, PinnableCursor
Cursor clip that can act independently from the user's clip selection if desired by being pinned in the controller settings panel.
Since:
API version 10
